name: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine margarine and sugars in a mixing bowl; beat until creamy.
2. Stir in peanut butter, egg, and vanilla until well-combined.
3. Mix in flour and baking soda until thoroughly combined.
4. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in sugar (3 to 4 tbsp).
6. Place cookies 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from baking sheets; make crosshatch marks with a fork.
9. Cool on wire racks.
